data.answer: The borrower is compliant for 2014Q2 with a Leverage Ratio of 3.606x, below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x, providing headroom of +0.144x [7][10]. The Device Strategy addback of $100M was permitted out of $130M charges, with $30M disallowed under the lifetime cap of $290M [10].

raw: {"answer": "The borrower is compliant for 2014Q2 with a Leverage Ratio of 3.606x, below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x, providing headroom of +0.144x [7][10]. The Device Strategy addback of $100M was permitted out of $130M charges, with $30M disallowed under the lifetime cap of $290M [10]."}
